'''tadara''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oenanthate|oenanthate]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-d-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oenanthate|oenanthate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| tadara
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:tædæræth|tædæræth]] || [[word:tædæræj|tædæræj]] || [[word:tædæræsh|tædæræsh]] || [[word:tædæræ|tædæræ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:tadadarath|tadadarath]] || [[word:tadadaraj|tadadaraj]] || [[word:tadadarash|tadadarash]] || [[word:tadadara|tadadara]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tadarath|tadarath]] || [[word:tadaraj|tadaraj]] || [[word:tadarash|tadarash]] || [[word:tadara|tadara]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tadafrath|tadafrath]] || [[word:tadafraj|tadafraj]] || [[word:tadafrash|tadafrash]] || [[word:tadafraf|tadafraf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tadaratha|tadaratha]] || [[word:tadaraja|tadaraja]] || [[word:tadarasha|tadarasha]] || [[word:tadaraka|tadaraka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tadarath|tadarath]] || [[word:tadaraj|tadaraj]] || [[word:tadarash|tadarash]] || [[word:tadara|tadara]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tadarathal|tadarathal]] || [[word:tadarajal|tadarajal]] || [[word:tadarashal|tadarashal]] || [[word:tadarakal|tadarakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tadarathatha|tadarathatha]] || [[word:tadarajaja|tadarajaja]] || [[word:tadarashasha|tadarashasha]] || [[word:tadaraka|tadaraka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tadarathan|tadarathan]] || [[word:tadarajan|tadarajan]] || [[word:tadarashan|tadarashan]] || [[word:tadarakan|tadarakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tadarathaoro|tadarathaoro]] || [[word:tadarajaoro|tadarajaoro]] || [[word:tadarashaoro|tadarashaoro]] || [[word:tadarakaoro|tadarakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c4abda}}
